feed.title: AO3 - Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: I Bet You’re In Love
entry.summary:
Author: BlurredHoney

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,643Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: It’s fluff, man. It’s Dick bonding with Bruce, Bruce not seeing his relationship with Hal as it is, and Dick deciding to take matters into his own hands, with the help of all of their friends, to prove to Bruce the thing he didn’t even remember he was supposed to be looking for.Bruce cranks out 50 squats with Dick sitting on his shoulders, for a bet. Dick looks contemplative. “What’s on your mind, chum?”“I was just thinking…” he sticks out his tongue from the corner of his mouth. “Would you tell me if you were dating someone?”Bruce cocks his head. “‘Course, chum. Why?”“Well, it’s just, I feel like you might not. But you know I’m old enough, right? You can tell me about that stuff, I won’t be like, weirded out, or anything.”“I know that.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Dick Grayson & Bruce Wayne
  • Hal Jordan (Green Lantern)/Bruce Wayne

  • Father-Son Relationship

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,209Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 329

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I Time Travel to Meet Another Version of my Parents
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,035Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 167

Summary: Takemichi planned to go back to the future and meet up with Naoto. That was it. So why did he end up in another city, finding another version of his parents, and why was his mom a guy here?

entry.title: They Started It!!! (A Story On How to Piss Off Five Children and Seduce Their Father by Hal Jordan)
entry.summary:
Author: RegretsEverything

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,448Chapters: 7/15Kudos: 776

Summary: “My dad says adult bodies can’t survive on Red Bull and cereal alone. Do you even know how to cook rice, Mr. Jordan? Is your tummy okay?” Hal Jordan’s stomach is fine. His pride is not. For reasons known only to the universe at large, the Wayne kids have decided that bullying Hal is their newest hobby. In their under-twelve years of wisdom, they’ve concluded he is too single, too lonely, and way too funny when flustered. Hal tries to ignore them… until one day he snaps and fires back the pettiest way possible: He starts flirting with their dad. ----------------- Or Hal has beef with literal preschoolers as a literal adult man. The Wayne kids bully a full ass adult because he is an easy target and gives top tier reactions. Then they completely lose their minds when Hal turns around and seduces their dad. ----------------- No powers au. Neighbors au. Bruce isn't Batman. Hal isn't Green Lantern. The batkids are still menaces, though.

entry.title: Why am I doing this again?
entry.summary:
Author: Brewky

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 678Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 18

Summary: Hal was expecting a day spent sleeping through 3 months at most, with him getting called and carrying on duties during his stay in outer space, nonstop. Saying he wasn't tired was a big understatement. Yet of course, flipping Batman had to break into his apartment like he owned it. That man can take Gotham all he wants, but he doesn't have the right to break into the JL homes even for emergencies. Hal wanted to yell at Batman as soon as he saw him on his couch, only to stop and freeze at the sight of a bundle held by the other man. Black and white hair. Is that...?   "When did Jason become a baby…?" Batman just grunted in response, likely annoyed. How is he the one to be annoyed with Hal when he should be the one pissed right now??   Aka Hal having to help Batman deal with baby Jason, unwillingly   (inspired by this one writer who wrote baby Jason and Kyle, my fav 💖💖💖💖💖)

entry.title: your dearest fantasy
entry.summary:
Author: apricusapollo

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,660Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 81

Summary: And just like that, Bruce knows that none of this is real, it can’t be.The moment he admits it to himself, more blurry memories start to come back, flashing in his mind. He remembers going on a mission with the League to take care of some intergalactic terrorists, just like he remembers catching a glimpse of Black Mercy and hearing Clark yell at him to watch out before everything went dark.“This isn’t real, none of it.” Bruce whispers, watching as Hal sighs out in defeat and glances over at the dining room where their family is happily chattering.“No, but wouldn’t it be nice if it were?”Bruce takes a step towards Hal and gently cups his jaw, pressing a small kiss against the corner of his mouth. “It would be but it’s not, and I can’t stay here.”(or, a universe, where the influence of the Black Mercy and his perfect fantasy world is what finally gets Bruce to be honest about his feelings for Hal.)

entry.title: live on in your eyes and not your mind
entry.summary:
Author: HC_Carter12

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,588Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Despite what Clark seemed to think, Bruce was not nervous. Bruce was not only the third richest man in the world, a competent businessman and a father of seven. He was the goddamn Batman. Batman didn’t get nervous. “I’m just saying it would make sense if you were nervous about today,” said Clark, ignoring Bruce’s glare. “It’s not every day you have to interview your dead mom- who it turns out hasn’t been dead in years- because she magically mentored a former friend while he was dead, because now that friend has come back to life as well.” Bruce felt his eye begin to twitch behind the cowl’s lens. “Shut up, Clark.”   Hal Jordan was brought back to life, which would be great if it didn't involve Martha Wayne also being alive and Bruce not knowing a thing about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Gotham is the worst
entry.summary:
Author: Frey_S

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,173Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 768

Summary: On top of Hal's list of things he hates are three things: charity galas, Gotham and Batman. So of course he ends up dealing with all of those in one night, even if he doesn't technically know he ends up sleeping with that last one. He's never letting Carol drag him to rich people events ever again. In which Hal dates Bruce Wayne. Tells him he's Green Lantern. Breaks up with him. And then sort of dates Batman without knowing that he is in fact sleeping with Bruce Wayne again.

entry.title: 5 times people realize Batman has a favorite person and 1 time Hal finally knows who it is
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,238Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 782

Summary: Batman doesn't have a favourite. He's not the type. He has never had a favourite—even among his own horde of children. Or so he thinks.Because that is a blatant lie. Anyone with eyes would say so. His friends, his family, his enemies, even Alfred the Cat can see it.Or hear it.Because it started with a nickname,"Spooky".

entry.title: Maritime Hostile Takeover
entry.summary:
Author: Pneumatic

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 122,185Chapters: 27/27Kudos: 1,365

Summary: The colony of seals didn’t usually bother Hal whenever he was working, so he paid them no mind unless he was trying to get one to move out his way. How was he supposed to know that finding one of their pelts would trigger a whole-ass situation he was totally unqualified to deal with?

entry.title: Hal Jordan Does NOT Want To Kiss Bruce Wayne!
entry.summary:
Author: Captain_Kinky

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,883Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 49

Summary: “No way I’m kissing that jackass!” Hal crumples up the script, scoffing as he shoots a glare towards Bruce. “Look, I signed up for this before I knew what he was like.” He turns towards Oliver, the director, but most importantly, one of his best friends. “C’mon, Ol, don’t make me do this, man.” “Hal, you dick, you can’t pull out on this now! This is the whole emotional crux of the movie— the tension, the fighting, the misunderstandings— this kiss is supposed to be them overcoming it.” “Can’t an ‘I love you,’ and a hug suffice?” Hal groans, knowing full well it won’t. He’s complaining for the sake of complaining now.Oliver’s blonde bushy-browed glare is answer enough. The last thing this movie needs is a queerbaiting allegation. “Be professional, Jordan,” Bruce saunters over, his arms crossed, looking unfairly good in his character’s black turtleneck and grey dress slacks. “The sooner we get the job done well, the sooner we can say goodbye.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Bleeding out of Time
entry.summary:
Author: Radiioblabla

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,283Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 240

Summary: Batman was down. Hal was naturally protective of the people he loved, but his teammates were of course completely oblivious to the fact that Bruce was one of those people. It must be strange for them, seeing Hal so emotional over someone whose buttons he tended to press the most. OR When Bruce randomly collapses in the middle of a fight, Hal, trapped in a state of sheer worry and panic, can't be bothered to conceal his emotions which then causes a surprising revelation to be brought into the light.

entry.title: Who will win?
entry.summary:
Author: Dei_dara_19

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,897Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Who will win the bat's heart? Hal Jordan? Lex Luthor? Minhkhoa Khan? Clarification: Superman and Batman do NOT end up together. This is the first time I've written a story like this. The characters do NOT belong to me; they belong to DC. CLARIFICATION TWO: this is a translated story. The creator gave me full rights to translate her fanfic and upload it to my ao3 account! I will be leaving the link to the fanfic. Link to the fanfic on Wattpad: https://www.wattpad.com/story/407114197?utm_source=android&utm_medium=link&utm_content=story_info&wp_page=story_details_button&wp_uname=nigromante_016

entry.title: False Mirror
entry.summary:
Author: SourFox

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,473Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 90

Summary: It was the end of the line for Hal. Not for the first time, but it was slower, had an air of finality to it. What were you supposed to do on a ship that's life support was failing? Well, he guessed what anyone would do when faced with a slow death - reminisce.

entry.title: Emerald Rain
entry.summary:
Author: StarSapphireBruce

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,042Chapters: 7/33Kudos: 80

Summary: He was designated to lead the world’s greatest heroes. He wasn’t prepared for Hal Jordan.A delicious distraction wrapped in green glow...Leadership was never supposed to feel like this...... like wanting something he couldn’t afford to want.

entry.title: [Pod] We're friends with benefits, right?
entry.summary:
Author: Dust_Bunny_Meow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 36

Summary: Hal Jordan is afraid he wouldn't be a good partner. He's afraid he wouldn't be a good father. He's afraid he'll fuck things up and doesn't even realize it.But with friends with benefits, he could get someone warm to hold at night and when the sun rises, they would part ways and never see each other again.That is what friends with benefits are supposed to be.Right?Then why is Hal living in Bruce's manor, eating his food and co-parenting his kids?Podfic of We're friends with benefits, right? by rie_rotisse

entry.title: Bruce how is the league your personal harem now?!?
entry.summary:
Author: Eclipsing_Light

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,738Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 47

Summary: This is a sequel to my previous work in my bat harem series, go read the other one first. After the impromptu identity reveal, courtesy of Dick, the league are all losing it (except for Dinah, she's fine) over Batman being Bruce Wayne. They all are totally whipped about it. Bruce is wishing he stayed part-time for the league, while also tackling a new kid to train (Jason), but hey at least he has a whole league willing to babysit for him. Except they're also trying to date him. Also fair warning, I proofread all these myself and also have no concept of when a chapter is too long. You have been warned.Rated teen for cursing and Hal's existence. Also I have a discord. Come join and give me recommendations. I need them.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Justice League/Bruce Wayne
  • Barry Allen/Bruce Wayne
